title: YO17 6RL, J.S.R. Genetics Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/GP3101LS/T003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: J.S.R. Genetics Limited   Installation name: Scampston Pig Unit   Permit number: EPR/GP3101LS/T003   "
